title: sphaeranthus africanus
intro: Sphaeranthus africanus, also known as African button or buttonbush, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Africa and the Indian Ocean islands. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. Some of the health benefits associated with Sphaeranthus africanus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating fever, as well as supporting immune function and wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture or capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
